behaviors.BHV_Loiter: Keeps the vehicle loitering around a point or polygon.
behaviors.BHV_StationKeep: Keeps the vehicle near a station point using inner and outer radii.
behaviors.BHV_Waypoint: Drives the vehicle through one or more waypoint points or a waypoint polygon.

parameters.activeflag: Posts a flag when the behavior becomes active.
parameters.capture_line: Waypoint option allowing capture by crossing a line near the waypoint.
parameters.capture_radius: Radius within which a waypoint is considered captured.
parameters.center_activate: Station-keep option that centers the behavior when it activates.
parameters.clockwise: Loiter option controlling polygon traversal direction.
parameters.condition: Boolean condition that must be true for the behavior to run.
parameters.duration: Maximum or intended duration for a behavior when supported.
parameters.endflag: Posts a flag when the behavior completes.
parameters.idleflag: Posts a flag when the behavior is idle.
parameters.initialize: Initializes a helm variable before mode logic runs.
parameters.inner_radius: Station-keep radius inside which the vehicle is considered close to station.
parameters.name: Unique name for this behavior instance.
parameters.outer_radius: Station-keep radius outside which the vehicle transits back toward station.
parameters.outer_speed: Station-keep speed used outside the outer radius.
parameters.perpetual: Controls whether the behavior can complete or should keep running.
parameters.polygon: Polygon or waypoint list used by a behavior.
parameters.priority: Behavior priority weight. Often equivalent in use to pwt.
parameters.pwt: Behavior priority weight used by the IvP Helm objective function.
parameters.repeat: Number of times to repeat a waypoint sequence when supported.
parameters.runflag: Posts a flag when the behavior is running.
parameters.set: Defines a helm mode and its conditions.
parameters.slip_radius: Waypoint radius outside capture radius where capture behavior may still apply.
parameters.transit_speed: Station-keep speed used while transiting back toward station.
parameters.updates: MOOS variable used for runtime behavior updates.
parameters.visual_hints: Display hints for visual objects posted by a behavior.
